resources.string: Save one or more servers and switch between them: your PC\'s LAN address for home Wi-Fi (e.g. http://192.168.1.20:3000) and its Tailscale address for anywhere else (e.g. http://100.x.x.x:3000). Pick a saved server from the dropdown, or type a new label + URL and tap Save & use. Also set your TravelBoard username and the WHATSAPP_INGEST_KEY from the server\'s .env file.
